symptom_description: Drive belts show excessive side wear, fraying cords, and glazing across pulley contact surfaces. Tension significantly degraded. Suspect binding or restriction here caused elevated current draw on DRYER-202.
root_cause: Improper initial belt tensioning (`too loose`) allowed slippage and frictional glazing during high torque starts.
action_taken: Cleaned oil mist off sheave grooves using solvent, installed new matched V-belt set, and adjusted motor slide base tension.
parts_used: Heavy Duty V-Belt Set (3-Pack), Solvent Cleaner (1 Can)

symptom_description: Air discharge temp steadily climbing over past 48 hours, reaching `91`°C during peak shift demands.
root_cause: Internal oil cooler passages partially plugged with oil varnish deposits, reducing heat transfer efficiency.
action_taken: Replaced faulty thermostatic oil bypass valve assembly, topped off compressor oil level, and cleaned cooler core exterior.
parts_used: Cabinet Ventilation Filter Pad, Oil Top-off Bottle

symptom_description: Thermal warning alarm active on compressor controller. Unit operating at `134` Amps with gradual heat buildup inside acoustic enclosure.
root_cause: Thermal bypass valve failed in closed position, preventing hot oil from circulating through external cooler core.
action_taken: Replaced faulty thermostatic oil bypass valve assembly, topped off compressor oil level, and cleaned cooler core exterior.
parts_used: Thermostatic Oil Bypass Valve Kit, Compressor Oil (1 Gal), O-Ring Set

symptom_description: Tech observed visual vibration and whipping of drive belts across sheaves (`0.32` in/sec RMS on bearing frame).
root_cause: Normal mechanical wear and stretching of V-belts after exceeding 12,000 hours of continuous loading/unloading duty.
action_taken: Swapped out glazed V-belts with new matched set, verified pulley groove profiles for wear, and torqued slide rail bolts.
parts_used: Cogged V-Belt Matched Set (BX-68), Slide Base Bolt Set

symptom_description: High discharge temperature trip (`> 110°C`) activated. Air blowing back through intake air filter assembly during unloader cycle.
root_cause: Broken valve spring allowed valve disc to flutter and slam against guard, cracking valve seating surface.
action_taken: Disassembled valve pockets, cleaned carbon buildup using chemical solvent, and installed new reed valve rebuild kits.
parts_used: Reed Valve Replacement Pack, Valve Cover O-Ring Set

symptom_description: Oil analysis report indicates high acid number (TAN > 1.5) and severe particulate depletion of anti-wear additives. Checked mechanical alignment and interlocks with coupled unit DRYER-202 during inspection.
root_cause: Mixing of incompatible lubricant brands during top-off by operations caused chemical precipitation and foaming.
action_taken: Flushed reservoir, replaced oil filter and separator element, cleaned thermal bypass valve, and took fresh baseline oil sample.
parts_used: Oil Filter Cartridge, Separator Kit, Compressor Flushing Fluid (2 Gal), Synthetic Lube Oil

symptom_description: Drive belts show severe side wear, fraying cords, and glazing across pulley contact surfaces. Tension significantly degraded.
root_cause: Normal mechanical wear and stretching of V-belts after exceeding 12,000 hours of continuous loading/unloading duty.
action_taken: Cleaned oil mist off sheave grooves using solvent, installed new matched V-belt set, and adjusted motor slide base tension.
parts_used: Heavy Duty V-Belt Set (3-Pack), Solvent Cleaner (1 Can)

symptom_description: High air discharge temperature trip (`98`°C) shut down compressor package. Oil cooler radiator feels intermittent hot across all passes.
root_cause: Internal oil cooler passages partially plugged with oil varnish deposits, reducing heat transfer efficiency.
action_taken: Circulated chemical descaling/de-varnishing agent through internal cooler passages, flushed system, and replaced oil filter.
parts_used: Coil Cleaning Degreaser (2 Gallons), Replacement Cooler Core Gaskets

symptom_description: High discharge temperature trip (`> 110°C`) activated. Air blowing back through intake air filter assembly during unloader cycle.
root_cause: Broken valve spring allowed valve disc to flutter and slam against guard, cracking valve seating surface.
action_taken: Isolated compressor, removed cylinder head, and replaced complete suction and discharge valve assemblies and gaskets.
parts_used: Reed Valve Replacement Pack, Valve Cover O-Ring Set

symptom_description: High discharge temperature trip (`> 110°C`) activated. Air blowing back through intake air filter assembly during unloader cycle. Maintenance triggered after unusual process flow/pressure drop noted on primary process unit DRYER-202.
root_cause: Fatigue fracture of stainless steel valve plate/reed inside discharge valve assembly due to billions of cyclic flexures.
action_taken: Isolated compressor, removed cylinder head, and replaced complete suction and discharge valve assemblies and gaskets.
parts_used: Valve Rebuild Kit (Plates, Springs, Seats), High-Temp Head Gaskets

symptom_description: Oil analysis report indicates high acid number (TAN > 1.5) and severe particulate depletion of anti-wear additives. Unit overdrawing current when DRYER-202 operates at peak capacity.
root_cause: Operating compressor past recommended 8,000-hour oil change interval caused thermal oxidation and breakdown of synthetic lubricant.
action_taken: Drained contaminated fluid, replaced thermostatic mixing valve element, renewed filters, and filled with certified compressor lubricant.
parts_used: Oil Filter Cartridge, Separator Kit, Compressor Flushing Fluid (2 Gal), Synthetic Lube Oil

symptom_description: Oil sight glass shows unusual dark, foamy oil with heavy sludge formation. Compressor running `94`°C above normal discharge temp. Suspect binding or restriction here caused elevated current draw on DRYER-202.
root_cause: Ingestion of humid, chemically contaminated intake air from nearby chemical processing bath accelerated oil sludge formation.
action_taken: Flushed reservoir, replaced oil filter and separator element, cleaned thermal bypass valve, and took fresh baseline oil sample.
parts_used: Complete Maintenance Filter & Oil Kit (Separator, Oil Filter, Air Filter, Oil)

symptom_description: High differential pressure alarm (`> 15 PSI`) triggered across air/oil separator element. Excessive oil carryover into plant air header. Also inspected DRYER-202 to rule out secondary mechanical strain or electrical feed anomalies.
root_cause: Failure of thermostatic bypass valve caused oil to run continuously chilled, allowing condensate moisture to emulsify with oil.
action_taken: Drained degraded compressor oil, flushed oil sump with cleaning solvent, replaced air/oil separator and oil filter, and refilled with synthetic ISO VG 46 oil.
parts_used: Synthetic Compressor Oil ISO VG 46 (5 Gal), Air/Oil Separator Element, Spin-On Oil Filter

symptom_description: Drive belts show persistent side wear, fraying cords, and glazing across pulley contact surfaces. Tension significantly degraded.
root_cause: Improper initial belt tensioning (`too loose`) allowed slippage and frictional glazing during high torque starts.
action_taken: Cleaned oil mist off sheave grooves using solvent, installed new matched V-belt set, and adjusted motor slide base tension.
parts_used: Heavy Duty V-Belt Set (3-Pack), Solvent Cleaner (1 Can)

symptom_description: Loud persistent squealing and clicking sound from compressor drive belt guard during startup and loading cycles.
root_cause: Oil mist drip from minor shaft seal leak contaminated V-belt rubber, causing softening and loss of grip.
action_taken: Cleaned oil mist off sheave grooves using solvent, installed new matched V-belt set, and adjusted motor slide base tension.
parts_used: Replacement Drive Belt Kit, Sheave Lock Bushings
